hero.headline: Building design teams that ship — and love the work
hero.description: I'm Tobias Treppmann, a hands-on design leader who has repeatedly built high-performing teams from the ground up. I can open Figma in the morning and facilitate cross-functional alignment in the afternoon. My teams ship real products, not just concepts.

aboutSnippet: 15+ years of design leadership across B2B SaaS, platform design, and consumer products. Proven track record of UX maturity transformation at Datameer, Hypoport, Ninox, and ChurchDesk — turning design from a service function into a strategic partner.
designChopsHighlight: Hands-on from wireframe to shipped feature. Complex systems, platform design, and privacy-first products — not just strategy decks.
leadershipAngle: I transform how organizations value design. At every company, I've elevated design from a service function to a strategic partner — and built the teams to sustain it.

content.relevanceNote: End-to-end product design: from stakeholder research to shipped platform feature
Team design and leadership transformation — building the org that builds the product
My leadership philosophy: psychological safety, inclusive participation, dialogue-based change
AI-first processes for faster shipping and modern design workflows
